qry:select.name: RS0
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in table(' select c_empresa, d_empresa, c_liquidacion, d_titulo, count(oi_personal_liq) cuantas from liq19_liquidacion, org03_empresas, liq25_personal_liq where liq19_liquidacion.oi_liquidacion = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion %} and liq19_liquidacion.oi_empresa = org03_empresas.oi_empresa and liq19_liquidacion.oi_liquidacion = liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion group by c_empresa, d_empresa, c_liquidacion, d_titulo
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table(' select e_numero_legajo, d_ape_y_nom,c_variable ,d_variable, liq25_val_varen.n_valor valor from liq25_personal_liq, liq25_val_varen , per02_personal_emp, per01_personal , liq09_variables where liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion %} and liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_liq = liq25_val_varen.oi_personal_liq and per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp = liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp and per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal and liq09_variables.oi_variable = liq25_val_varen.oi_variable order by e_numero_legajo ')/ROWS/ROW
